expectations.text: Uses pypdf (PdfReader) or pdfplumber for extraction
Iterates over all pages in the PDF
Saves extracted text to a .txt file
expectations.evidence: Writes to output_path with open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8')

expectations.text: Handles the case where a PDF has no extractable text
expectations.evidence: Checks 'if not all_text.strip()' and prints OCR suggestion
